title: . Offenses. Offenses penalized under this Code and the rules and regulations issued pursuant
content:
. Offenses. Offenses penalized under this Code and the rules and regulations issued pursuant 
thereto shall prescribe in three (3) years. 
All unfair labor practice arising from Book V shall be filed with the appropriate agency within one (1) year from 
accrual of such unfair labor practice; otherwise, they shall be forever barred.
